variables.input:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_SCAN"
  AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(event.provider)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_SCAN"
  AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(container_image.registry)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_SCAN"
  AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(container_image.repository)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_SCAN"
  AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(container_image.tags, expand:true)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| dedup {object.id, vulnerability.id, component.name,
         container_image.registry, container_image.repository, container_image.tags}, sort: {timestamp desc}
// dashboard variables
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, 
           container_image.name=containerImageName, containerStatus}
| parse containerStatus, """LD* "state=" LD:containerStatus ("}" | ",")"""
| fieldsAdd containerStatus=if(isNull(containerStatus),"not running",else:containerStatus)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(containerStatus)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_FINDING"
     AND object.type == "CONTAINER_IMAGE"
     AND isNotNull(component.name)
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
    | expand dt.entity.process=processes
        | fieldsRemove processes
        | join [
            fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance, from:now()-3h
        ], on:{left[dt.entity.process]==right[id]}, kind:leftOuter, fields:{releasesProduct, releasesStage}
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName,
           releasesProduct, releasesStage, containerStatus}
| fieldsAdd releasesStage=if(isNull(releasesStage), "None", else:releasesStage)
| summarize rawValues = arrayRemoveNulls(arraySort(collectDistinct(releasesStage)))
| fieldsAdd values = if(arraySize(rawValues) > 0, rawValues, else:"None")

1.content:
# Coverage report for container image scan events

Summary of vulnerability scan events from container image scans, reported by various products.

4.title: Container image coverage by product
4.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_SCAN"
  AND object.type=="CONTAINER_IMAGE"
| dedup {event.provider, object.id}, sort: {timestamp desc}
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
// now enrich the runtime context
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
    | expand dt.entity.process=processes
        | fieldsRemove processes
        | join [
            fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance, from:now()-3h
        ], on:{left[dt.entity.process]==right[id]}, kind:leftOuter, fields:{releasesProduct, releasesStage}
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName,
           releasesProduct, releasesStage, containerStatus}
| parse containerStatus, """LD* "state=" LD:containerStatus ("}" | ",")"""
| fieldsAdd containerStatus=if(isNull(containerStatus),"not running",else:containerStatus)
| fieldsAdd releasesStage=if(isNull(releasesStage), "None", else:releasesStage)
| filter in(containerStatus, $RuntimeStatus) AND in(releasesStage,$ProductStage)
// summarize findings
| summarize {images=countDistinctExact(container_image.digest)}, by: {event.provider}
| sort images desc

15.content:
## Coverage overview
Distribution of security findings by reporting products and the corresponding affected object types.

16.title: Scan events over time by product
16.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_SCAN"
  AND object.type=="CONTAINER_IMAGE"
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
// now enrich the runtime context
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
    | expand dt.entity.process=processes
        | fieldsRemove processes
        | join [
            fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance, from:now()-3h
        ], on:{left[dt.entity.process]==right[id]}, kind:leftOuter, fields:{releasesProduct, releasesStage}
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName,
           releasesProduct, releasesStage, containerStatus}
| parse containerStatus, """LD* "state=" LD:containerStatus ("}" | ",")"""
| fieldsAdd containerStatus=if(isNull(containerStatus),"not running",else:containerStatus)
| fieldsAdd releasesStage=if(isNull(releasesStage), "None", else:releasesStage)
| filter in(containerStatus, $RuntimeStatus) AND in(releasesStage,$ProductStage)
// get the latest vulnerability finding report for the affected entity and the component of the repository in the registry
| makeTimeseries count(), time:{timestamp}, interval: 24h, by:{event.provider}

17.title: Total scan events
17.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_SCAN"
  AND object.type=="CONTAINER_IMAGE"
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
// now enrich the runtime context
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
    | expand dt.entity.process=processes
        | fieldsRemove processes
        | join [
            fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance, from:now()-3h
        ], on:{left[dt.entity.process]==right[id]}, kind:leftOuter, fields:{releasesProduct, releasesStage}
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName,
           releasesProduct, releasesStage, containerStatus}
| parse containerStatus, """LD* "state=" LD:containerStatus ("}" | ",")"""
| fieldsAdd containerStatus=if(isNull(containerStatus),"not running",else:containerStatus)
| fieldsAdd releasesStage=if(isNull(releasesStage), "None", else:releasesStage)
| filter in(containerStatus, $RuntimeStatus) AND in(releasesStage,$ProductStage)
// summarize the events
| summarize {scanEvents=count()}

18.title: Repository coverage based on products and number of scans
18.query:
fetch security.events
| filter event.type == "VULNERABILITY_SCAN"
  AND object.type=="CONTAINER_IMAGE"
// variable fields
| filter in(event.provider, $Product)
     AND in(container_image.registry, $Registry)
     AND in(container_image.repository, $Repository)
     AND in(container_image.tags, $Tag)
// now enrich the runtime context
| join [
    fetch dt.entity.container_group_instance, from:now()-3h
    | fieldsAdd entity.name, containerImageDigest, containerImageName, workloadName, containerStatus, processes=contains[dt.entity.process_group_instance]
    | expand dt.entity.process=processes
        | fieldsRemove processes
        | join [
            fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance, from:now()-3h
        ], on:{left[dt.entity.process]==right[id]}, kind:leftOuter, fields:{releasesProduct, releasesStage}
], on:{left[container_image.digest]==right[containerImageDigest]}, kind:leftOuter,
   fields:{container_instance.id=id, container_instance.name=entity.name, container_image.name=containerImageName,
           releasesProduct, releasesStage, containerStatus}
| parse containerStatus, """LD* "state=" LD:containerStatus ("}" | ",")"""
| fieldsAdd containerStatus=if(isNull(containerStatus),"not running",else:containerStatus)
| fieldsAdd releasesStage=if(isNull(releasesStage), "None", else:releasesStage)
| filter in(containerStatus, $RuntimeStatus) AND in(releasesStage,$ProductStage)
// summarize findings
| summarize {`Scan events`=count(), 
             `Scanning products`=collectDistinct(event.provider)}, 
  by:{
    Repository=container_image.repository, 
    Tags=container_image.tags}
| sort `Scan events` desc
| limit 50
